roa.docketEntryComment: AJW/WVD ALL CTS UNTIL TODAY/CH2-SP3Y(U)-ESS,CC TO CT1/12022,1PC CT2,STRKNTOT TERM IMPOSED SP5Y,CS TO #153733/PROB3Y/PJ1Y/CC WITH #153733/NO CTSNOT/NO WEAPS/WS/LF/VF1/11590/RX/DTC
